---
title: "Shiny app"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
    runtime: shiny
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
  library(shiny)
  library(readr)
  library(purrr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(magrittr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(abind)
  library(cowplot)
  library(data.table)
  library(reshape2)
  
  # Computes pairwise KL distance so we can sensibly merge clusters
  get_KL_distance <- function(mu1, mu2, Sigma1, Sigma2) {
      k <- nrow(Sigma1)
      KL1 <- 0.5 * (sum(diag(solve(Sigma1) %*% Sigma2)) - k + log(det(Sigma1) / det(Sigma2)))
      KL2 <- 0.5 * (sum(diag(solve(Sigma2) %*% Sigma1)) - k + log(det(Sigma2) / det(Sigma1)))
  
      0.5 * (KL1 + KL2)
  }
  
  # Finds loci close to genes
  find_close_loci <-
      function(gene_start,
               gene_end,
               ctcf_start,
               ctcf_end,
               distance = 3000) {
          test_proximity <- matrix(FALSE, length(ctcf_start), 4)
          test_proximity[, 1] <-
              abs(gene_start - ctcf_start) <= distance
          test_proximity[, 2] <-
              abs(gene_start - ctcf_end) <= distance
          test_proximity[, 3] <-
              abs(gene_end - ctcf_start) <= distance
          test_proximity[, 4] <- abs(gene_end - ctcf_end) <= distance
          if (any(test_proximity)) {
              idx <- which(apply(test_proximity, 1, any))
              idx
          }
      }
  
  # Read in parameeter estimates
  load("output/vision_shiny/Data/params.Rdata")
  nm <- params$nm
  mu <- params$mu
  prop <- params$prop
  z_chain <- params$z_chain
  sig_ests <- params$sig_ests
  rm(params)
  
  # Get data and loci
  load("output/vision_shiny/Data/dat11_noh.Rdata")
  dm <- ncol(dat)
  z <- apply(z_chain, 1, function(X) rle(sort(X))$values[which.max(rle(sort(X))$lengths)])
  n <- nrow(z_chain)
  loci <- readr::read_tsv("output/vision_shiny/Data/chr11_loci.txt", col_names = FALSE)
  cells <- read.table("output/vision_shiny/Data/cells.txt")$V1
  
  cluster_dist <- matrix(0, nm, nm)
  combos <- combn(nm,2)
  for(i in 1:ncol(combos)) {
      cluster_dist[combos[1,i], combos[2,i]] <-
          cluster_dist[combos[2,i], combos[1,i]] <-
          get_KL_distance(mu1 = mu[,combos[1,i]],
                          mu2 =  mu[,combos[2,i]],
                          Sigma1 = sig_ests[,,combos[1,i]],
                          Sigma2 = sig_ests[,,combos[2,i]])
  }
  rownames(cluster_dist) <- colnames(cluster_dist) <- 1:nm
  cl <- hclust(as.dist(cluster_dist), method = "ward.D")
  
  # RNA-seq info
  load("output/vision_shiny/Data/rna.Rdata")
  rna_genes <- as.character(rna[[1]]$gene_id) %>%
      gsub(replacement = "", pattern = "ENSMUSG") %>%
      strsplit(split = "\\.") %>%
      purrr::map(1) %>%
      unlist
  rna <- lapply(rna, function(X) X[,2]) %>%
      abind::abind(along = 2)
  rownames(rna) <- rna_genes
  rna_var <- apply(rna, 1, var)
  
  genes <- readr::read_tsv("output/vision_shiny/Data/knownGene.txt", col_names = FALSE) %>%
      dplyr::filter(X2 == "chr11") %>%
      dplyr::select(X1, X2, X4, X5)
  genes$X1 <-
      gsub(genes$X1, pattern = "ENSMUST", replacement = "") %>%
      strsplit(split = "\\.") %>%
      purrr::map(1) %>%
      unlist
  
  post_probs <- matrix(0, n, nm)
  for(i in 1:n) {
      rles <- rle(sort(z_chain[i,]))
      post_probs[i, rles$values] <- rles$lengths
  }
  post_probs <- post_probs/n

shinyApp(
  ui <- 
    fluidPage(
        # App title ----
        titlePanel("CTCF binding patterns across chromosome 11"),
        # Sidebar layout with input and output definitions ----
        sidebarLayout(
            # Sidebar panel for inputs ----
            sidebarPanel(
                # Input: Slider for the number of bins ----
                sliderInput(inputId = "groups",
                            label = "Number of groups:",
                            min = 1,
                            max = nm,
                            value = 10,
                            step = 1),
                numericInput(inputId = "loci_min",
                             label = "Lower bound genomic locus:",
                             min = min(loci),
                             max = max(loci)-1,
                             value = min(loci)),
                numericInput(inputId = "loci_max",
                             label = "Upper bound genomic locus:",
                             min = min(loci)+1,
                             max = max(loci),
                             value = max(loci)),
                numericInput(inputId = "var_quantile",
                             label = "Quantile for top genes:",
                             min = 0,
                             max = 1,
                             value = 0.333),
                sliderInput(inputId = "distance_from_gene",
                            label = "Max distance between CTCF and gene:",
                            min = 0,
                            max = 10000,
                            value = 3000,
                            step = 10),
                sliderInput(inputId = "group_num",
                            label = "Group number:",
                            min = 1,
                            max = nm,
                            value = 6,
                            step = 1)
            ),
            # Main panel for displaying outputs ----
            mainPanel(
                plotOutput(outputId = "rectbin", height = 850)
            )
        )
    ),
  
  server <- function(input, output) {
      output$rectbin <- renderPlot({
          merge_idx <- cutree(cl, k = input$groups)
          merge_labs <- z
          for(i in seq_along(merge_labs)) {
              merge_labs[i] <- merge_idx[z[i]]
          }
  
          merge_prop <- rep(0, length(unique(merge_idx)))
          merge_mu <- matrix(NA, length(unique(merge_idx)), dm)
          for(i in sort(unique(merge_idx))) {
              sub_prop <- prop[merge_idx == i]
              sub_mu <- mu[,merge_idx == i]
              merge_prop[i] <- sum(sub_prop)
  
              if(length(sub_prop) == 1) {
                  merge_mu[i,] <- sub_mu
              } else {
                  merge_mu[i,] <- sub_mu %*% (sub_prop/merge_prop[i])
              }
          }
          merge_prop <- merge_prop/sum(merge_prop)
          
          loci2 <- loci[merge_labs == input$group_num,]
          df <- data.frame(loci, merge_labs, ymin = 0, ymax = .01)
          
          mudf <- data.frame(merge_mu)
          colnames(mudf) <- cells
          molten <- data.table::melt(mudf)
          colnames(molten) <- c("cell", "effect_size")
          molten$index <- rep(1:length(unique(merge_idx)), times = dm)
  
          top_gene_quantile <- quantile(rna_var, input$var_quantile)
          rna1 <- rna[rna_var >= top_gene_quantile,]
          rna_genes1 <- rna_genes[rna_var >= top_gene_quantile]
  
          genes_with_rna_data <-
              sapply(genes$X1, function(X)
                  which(rna_genes1 == X))
          genes_rmidx <-
              sapply(genes_with_rna_data, function(X)
                  identical(X, integer(0)))
  
          genes1 <- genes[!genes_rmidx,]
          rna2 <- rna1[unlist(genes_with_rna_data),]
          rna_genes2 <- rna_genes1[unlist(genes_with_rna_data)]
  
          loci_close_to_genes <-
              lapply(1:nrow(genes1), function(X)
                  find_close_loci(genes1$X4[X], genes1$X5[X], loci2$X1, loci2$X2, distance = input$distance_from_gene))
          names(loci_close_to_genes) <- rna_genes2
  
          rmidx <- sapply(loci_close_to_genes, function(X) is.null(X))
          rna3 <- rna2[!rmidx,]
          genes2 <- genes1[!rmidx,]
  
          post_probs <- post_probs[merge_labs == input$group_num,]
          obs_means <- post_probs %*% t(mu)
  
          loci_close_to_genes <- loci_close_to_genes[!rmidx]
          obs_means <- obs_means[unlist(loci_close_to_genes),]
  
          rna4 <- matrix(NA, length(unlist(loci_close_to_genes)), ncol(rna3))
          count <- 1
          for(i in 1:length(loci_close_to_genes)) {
              if(length(loci_close_to_genes[[i]]) == 1) {
                  rna4[count,] <- as.numeric(rna3[i,])
                  count <- count + 1
              } else {
                  for(j in 1:length(loci_close_to_genes[[i]])) {
                      rna4[count,] <- as.numeric(rna3[i,])
                      count <- count + 1
                  }
              }
          }
          colnames(rna4) <- paste0("expr_", colnames(rna3))
          
          
          colnames(obs_means) <- paste0("CTCF_", cells)
          ttt <- cbind(log(rna4+1), obs_means)
          tttcor <- cor(ttt, method = "spearman")
          if(!any(is.na(tttcor))) {
              cl1 <- hclust(dist(tttcor), method = "ward.D")$order
              ggcor <- reshape2::melt(tttcor[cl1, cl1])
          } else {
              hideidx <- is.na(tttcor[,1])
              subcor <- tttcor[!hideidx, !hideidx]
              cl1 <- hclust(dist(subcor), method = "ward.D")$order
  
              NAcor <- reshape2::melt(tttcor[hideidx, hideidx])
              showcor <- reshape2::melt(subcor[cl1,cl1])
              ggcor <- rbind(NAcor, showcor)
          }
          colnames(ggcor) <- c("Var1", "Var2", "corr")
          
          p0 <- ggplot() + geom_blank()
          
          p1 <- ggplot() +
              geom_rect(
                  data = df,
                  mapping = aes(
                      xmin = X1,
                      xmax = X2,
                      ymin = ymin,
                      ymax = ymax,
                      fill = as.factor(merge_labs)
                  )
              ) +
              scale_fill_discrete() +
              theme_cowplot() +
              theme(axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                    axis.line.y = element_blank(),
                    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                    legend.title = element_blank()) +
              xlim(c(input$loci_min, input$loci_max)) +
              labs(x = "loc") +
              guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol=round(input$groups/6)))
          
          p2 <- ggplot(molten, aes(x = cell, y = index, fill = effect_size)) +
              geom_tile(color = "black") +
              scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#ef629f") +
              labs(y = "group") +
              theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = .5),
                    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
  
          p3 <- ggplot(data = ggcor, aes(x=Var1, y=Var2, fill=corr)) +
              geom_tile() +
              scale_fill_gradient2(limits = c(-1,1), low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
              labs(x = "", y = "") +
              theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = .5)) +
              coord_fixed()
  
          grid1 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p0, p0, p0, p1, p0, p2,
                                      nrow = 3,
                                      ncol = 2,
                                      rel_heights = c(1,2,4),
                                      rel_widths = c(.1,1))
          grid2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(grid1, p3, nrow = 2, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1,1.5))
          grid2
          })
  },
  options = list(height = 1000)
)

```
